channel.title: Ai-Supply-Chain on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Ai-Supply-Chain on Archive 03

item.title: Why EWY and EWT Are Rising: The Real AI Supply Chain Bottleneck
item.description: Behind NVIDIA and the U.S. big tech AI rally sits a physical bottleneck: Taiwan’s foundry and packaging ecosystem, and Korea’s HBM memory supply chain. We examine why EWY and EWT are attracting attention as AI hardware supply-chain ETFs, and why geopolitics and semiconductor cycles still matter.
